name: upload_files_from_url
description: Upload files by providing external URLs. UploadThing will fetch and store the files, useful for migrating content or importing from other services.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the file to download and store in UploadThing.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Custom file name to use for the uploaded file. If omitted, the name is inferred from the URL.

parameters.name: customId
parameters.description: A custom identifier to associate with the file for easier lookup later.
